build.beforeDevCommand: if [ -d ../frontend ]; then cd ../frontend; elif [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend; elif [ -d ../../frontend ]; then cd ../../frontend; else echo 'frontend dir not found'; exit 1; fi; pnpm dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: if [ -d ../frontend ]; then cd ../frontend; elif [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend; elif [ -d ../../frontend ]; then cd ../../frontend; else echo 'frontend dir not found'; exit 1; fi; pnpm build
